title: Holo Notes
summary: Spatial audio sequencer blending hand tracking with responsive visuals.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const i={h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",ul:"ul",...o.components};return t(e,{children:[n(i.p,{children:n(i.img,{src:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1526481280695-3c469928b67b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",alt:"Performer manipulating holographic audio loops"})}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Holo Notes explores how musicians can sculpt sound in mid-air. I led the interaction design, front-end implementation, and motion direction."}),"

title: Orbital Control
summary: Mission-critical interface for coordinating satellite deployments in real time.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const i={h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",strong:"strong",...r.components};return n(e,{children:[t(i.p,{children:t(i.img,{src:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500530855697-b586d89ba3ee?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",alt:"Operator desk with holographic wayfinding overlay"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"We partnered with a space logistics startup to design the command surface for their orbital deployment platform. The brief called for a visual language that felt like a cinematic sci-fi UI but remained production-ready and keyboard accessible."}),"
",t(i.h3,{children:"Highlights"}),"
",n(i.ol,{children:["
",n(i.li,{children:[t(i.strong,{children:"WebGL trajectory map"})," with shader-driven trails that respond to live telemetry."]}),"
",n(i.li,{children:[t(i.strong,{children:"Handoff-ready design system"})," with tokenized motion specs for engineers."]}),"
",n(i.li,{children:[t(i.strong,{children:"Automated stress testing"})," harness that simulated solar flare events and comms dropouts."]}),"
"]}),"
",t(i.p,{children:t(i.img,{src:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",alt:"Mission timeline interface showing anomaly alerts"})}),"
",t(i.p,{children:"We shipped the MVP in under eight weeks and trained the operations crew with interactive walkthroughs built directly in the app. Latency decreased by 34% thanks to the progressive data loading patterns we introduced."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
